executives.name: Haviv Ilan
executives.background: Haviv Ilan is president and chief executive officer of Texas Instruments. He has been with the company since 1999, serving in various leadership roles including chief operating officer and senior vice president of Analog Signal Chain.

executives.name: Rafael Lizardi
executives.background: Rafael Lizardi is senior vice president and chief financial officer. He joined TI in 2001 and has held several financial leadership positions, including corporate controller.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Ahmad Bahai
executives.background: Ahmad Bahai is senior vice president and chief technology officer, responsible for guiding TI’s technology strategy and research.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Mark Gary
executives.background: Mark Gary is senior vice president of Analog Power Products. He has held various leadership roles in TI's analog business units.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Analog Power Products

executives.name: Cynthia Hoff Trochu
executives.background: Cynthia Hoff Trochu is senior vice president, secretary and general counsel. She joined TI in 1993.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Secretary and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Richard Templeton
board_of_directors.background: Rich Templeton is chairman of the board. He served as TI's president and CEO from 2004 to 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Haviv Ilan
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Texas Instruments.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Blinn
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of Flowserve Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Janet Clark
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Marathon Oil Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Carrie Cox
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Humacyte, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Craighead
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Baker Hughes Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: Jean Hobby
board_of_directors.background: Former Strategy Officer at PricewaterhouseCoopers, LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald Kirk
board_of_directors.background: Senior Counsel at Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP and former U.S. Trade Representative.

board_of_directors.name: Pamela Patsley
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Chairman of MoneyGram International, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Sanchez
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Ryder System, Inc.

sources.source_description: Texas Instruments Official Website - Leadership and Management
